stages.summary: Fetched small curated public market sources and normalized them into raw market signals.
Extracted candidate-shaped niche app needs from daily public market signals.
Loaded daily market research inputs from public extraction first, with explicit manual fallback only when needed.
反応されやすい悩み、言い回し、画像構造を軽量集計しました。
Obsidian互換Markdownへ今日のリサーチ記録を保存しました。
日付とカテゴリから投稿タイミングを軽量評価しました。
Scored market-backed niche needs and selected the highest eligible candidate without fixed fallback.
Selected daily niche demand candidates only from scored market inputs with evidence and source URLs.
Traced the selected candidate back to current public market evidence, source URLs, freshness, and fallback state.
Defined the target segment and wording for the selected market-backed candidate.
Created candidate-specific UI card direction from the selected market need.
Converted candidate audience strategy into a concrete Threads tone profile.
API未設定のため、5役の圧縮会議をルールベースfallbackで生成しました。
Generated natural Threads copy from 10 rotating audience-aware structures instead of a single fixed template.
Generated a smartphone-first app UI screenshot without sales-copy framing.
1080x1350のカード画像素材をHTML/SVGで生成しました。
Checked market evidence, candidate consistency, and audience tone before post selection.
Selected only tone-adapted copy approved by the quality risk gate.
Audited that the selected post and image are backed by today's market research and are not duplicated.
Threads posting was evaluated through AUTO_POST, DRY_RUN, target, duplicate, post source audit, and secrets guards.
Threads insights are initialized as null unless a later metrics fetch supplies real values.
Reaction memory was updated with an initial live-post record when available, without reading secrets.
Next seed weights, web candidates, note candidates, and weekly report were updated from the selected market candidate.
